mapper.select: SELECT USERID , NAME , MOBILE_NO , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 1), 'YYYY') YEAR_TEXT , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 1), 'MM') MONTH_TEXT , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 1), 'DD') DATE_TEXT FROM MCP_USER WHERE USER_DIVISION = '00' AND SYS_LDATE = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -11), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MCP_USER WHERE USER_DIVISION = '00' AND NVL(SYS_LDATE, TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) < TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_USER SET PASSWORD = '' ,NAME = '탈퇴회원' ,AUTH_CODE = 'USER_ROLE' ,CUST_NUM = '' ,AUTH_KEY = '' ,PIN = '' ,USER_DIVISION = '' ,EMAIL = '' ,EMAIL_CODE = '' ,POST = '' ,ADDRESS = '' ,ADDRESS_DTL = '' ,ADDRESS_BJD = '' ,MOBILE_NO = '' ,CONTACT_NO = '' ,BIRTHDAY = '' ,GENDER = '' ,LOGIN_COUNT = '0' ,STATUS = '3' ,REVOCATION_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE USER_DIVISION = '00' AND NVL(SYS_LDATE, TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) < TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND STATUS != '3'
mapper.select: SELECT USERID , NAME , MOBILE_NO , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 1), 'YYYY') YEAR_TEXT , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 1), 'MM') MONTH_TEXT , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 1), 'DD') DATE_TEXT FROM MCP_USER WHERE USER_DIVISION = '01' AND NVL(SYS_LDATE, TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) < TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_USER_HST ( HST_CRET_DT , HST_CHG_DT , USER_ID , LOGIN_PWD , NM , AUT_CODE , PIN , EMAIL , ZIPCD , ADDRESS , ADDRESS_DTL , MOBILE_NO , CTN , BIRTHDAY , GENDER , CRET_DT , AMD_DT , LOGIN_DT , LOGIN_CNT , USER_STTUS , CUST_NO , AUTH_KEY , USER_DIV , EMAIL_CODE , ADDRESS_BJD , REVOCATION_DATE , PWD_CHG_LAST_DT , EMAIL_RCV_YN , SMS_RCV_YN , LOGIN_FAIL_CNT , PWD_CHG_DELAY_DT , CLAUSE_PERSONAL_AD_YN , CUSTOMER_ID ) SELECT SYSDATE , NULL , USERID , PASSWORD , NAME , AUTH_CODE , PIN , EMAIL , POST , ADDRESS , ADDRESS_DTL , MOBILE_NO , CONTACT_NO , BIRTHDAY , GENDER , SYS_RDATE , SYS_UDATE , SYS_LDATE , LOGIN_COUNT , '4' , CUST_NUM , AUTH_KEY , USER_DIVISION , EMAIL_CODE , ADDRESS_BJD , REVOCATION_DATE , PWD_CHG_DT , EMAIL_RCV_YN , SMS_RCV_YN , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , PWD_CHG_DELAY_DT , CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG , CUSTOMER_ID FROM MCP_USER WHERE USERID = #{userid}
